zh.Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Cameron於1336年出生在蘇格蘭培爾音圖時，她的父親Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron53歲，母親Ellen Mowat of Montealto44歲。她和Nicholas Erskine至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1402年在蘇格蘭培爾金努爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Cameron于1336年出生在苏格兰培爾音圖时，她的父亲Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron53岁，母亲Ellen Mowat of Montealto44岁。她和Nicholas Erskine至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1402年在苏格兰培爾金努爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Cameron was born in 1336, in Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 53 and her mother, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, was 44. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Nicholas Erskine. She died in 1402, in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Cameron est née en 1336, à Inchture, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Nicholas Erskine. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Kinnoul, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Cameron 1336 in Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron 53 und ihre Mutter Ellen Mowat of Montealto 44. Sie hatte mit Nicholas Erskine mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1402 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Cameron è nata il nel 1336 nel Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Nicholas Erskine. Morì nel 1402, nel Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Cameronが1336年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアインチトゥアで生まれた時，父Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameronは53歳，母Ellen Mowat of Montealtoは44歳であった。彼女はNicholas Erskineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1402年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアキノウルで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Cameron(이)가 1336년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 인트르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Mowat of Montealto(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas Erskine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 킨우에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ballegarno Castle, Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Cameron nasceu em 1336, em Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Nicholas Erskine. Ela faleceu em 1402, em Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Cameron родилась в 1336 г. в местности инчтур, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Mowat of Montealto, 44. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Nicholas Erskine. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности кинноул, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Cameron nació en 1336, en Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Nicholas Erskine. Murió en 1402, en Kinnoul, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años.
